name: master-service-agreement
title: Master Service Agreement
introduction_text: This draft web form mirrors the master service agreement record so we can evaluate using a native Frappe web form for agreement capture later. It is intentionally unpublished for now.
success_message: The master service agreement record has been saved.
meta_description: Draft web form scaffold for the master service agreement record.

name: service-agreement-addendum
title: Service Agreement Addendum
introduction_text: This draft web form mirrors the service agreement addendum record so we can evaluate replacing the building-specific agreement step with a native Frappe web form later. It is intentionally unpublished for now.
success_message: The service agreement addendum record has been saved.
meta_description: Draft web form scaffold for the service agreement addendum record.

name: instant-quote-form
title: Instant Quote Request
introduction_text: Share the building details, cleaning frequency, and scope so we can create an estimate range and open the secure walkthrough flow for this request.
meta_description: Public instant quote intake form for recurring commercial cleaning requests.

web_form_fields.label: Building type
web_form_fields.options:
Office
Warehouse
Retail
Medical
Industrial
Educational
Other

web_form_fields.label: Service interest
web_form_fields.options:
Recurring standard cleaning
Recurring cleaning + restocking
Recurring cleaning + disinfection
Not sure - need recommendation
Special request / custom scope

name: contact-request-form
title: Contact Request
introduction_text: Tell us what you need and we will route it to the right next step for service questions, walkthroughs, support, and custom-scope requests.
success_message: Thanks for reaching out. We received your message and will get back to you shortly.
meta_description: Public contact intake form for service questions, support, and walkthrough requests.

web_form_fields.label: Request type
web_form_fields.options:
General service question
Walkthrough request
Custom scope or out-of-area request
Current customer support
Careers or partner inquiry
